interaction_phrase: at Rice University and Vienna University of Technology (TU Wien)
occurrence_sentence: The study at Rice University and Vienna University of Technology (TU Wien) provides the strongest direct evidence to date of entanglement's role in bringing about quantum criticality, said study co-author Qimiao Si of Rice.
